ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for content discovery (fuzzy search posts, concepts, tabs)
ideas.why: Destination lens — borrowing Linear/Vercel's palette pattern for effortless navigation; explicitly allowed (not a shell) and closes the 'search / content discovery' gap for a site that wants to be bookmarked.

ideas.title: 3D WebGL knowledge-graph HUD of the 122-concept context ontology (force-directed, hover-to-teach)
ideas.why: Directly deepens the WebGL brain HUD, Knowledge-graph viz and Context ontology concepts (brain now knows 122 concepts across 6 domains) — turns the brain's own knowledge into a memorable, shareable showpiece.

ideas.title: Explorable explanation of the tiered LLM router economics (interactive spark-vs-cloud cost sim)
ideas.why: Router telemetry shows spark 64 / cloud_hard 660 / spark_today 9 — makes the Tiered LLM router, Inference economics and Explorable explanations concepts tangible with a playable cost/latency tradeoff the reader can drag.

ideas.title: Agent-oversight panel: per-agent decision log with approve/override + immutable audit trail
ideas.why: World signal 'Who governs the agents' + reverse-centaur critique on the HN front page, grounded in the ontology's Human-in-the-loop, Human-on-the-loop oversight and Agent accountability concepts — surface each autonomous agent's decision on the live pipeline tab.

ideas.title: Add a missing unit test for an uncovered branch in router_stats tier-selection logic
ideas.why: Verification-loop leverage — the 100%-coverage floor lives on blog-logic, but the Tiered LLM router selection in router_stats.py is untested; a real test hardens the harness (layer 1) not decorates it.

ideas.title: RSS/Atom autodiscovery link + valid feed for the blog
ideas.why: Audience-growth gap grounded in Social distribution and GitHub Pages — engineering blogs (e.g. Julia Evans) rely on RSS for return visits; a missing <link rel=alternate> costs subscribers and readers.
